recommendations.title: White Girl
recommendations.overview: Summer, New York City. A college girl falls hard for a guy she just met. After a night of partying goes wrong, she goes to wild extremes to get him back.

recommendations.title: I Do...Knot
recommendations.overview: Sebastian is very lucky with women, going to parties and getting drunk every night. His mother asks him to change his way of life but he refuses to stop partying and meeting new women. One day, after one night of serious partying he wakes up with a b

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil 2
recommendations.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.
recommendations.director: Yossapong Phonsup, Kongkiat Khomsiri, Pasith Buranajan, Putipong Saisikaew, Isara Nadee, Art Thamthrakul, Seree Phongnithi

recommendations.title: Borgman
recommendations.overview: An enigmatic vagrant cons himself into the home life of an arrogant upper-class family, turning their lives into a psychological nightmare in the process.

recommendations.title: Dude, Where's My Car?
recommendations.overview: Two stoners wake up after a night of partying and cannot remember where they parked their car.

recommendations.title: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A man's life is turned inside out after a visit from his college friend leads him into the unexpected.

recommendations.title: Satan
recommendations.overview: A group of young people leave a disco and bump into a shepherd who is ready to spend his night worshipping Satan.

recommendations.title: Shithouse
recommendations.overview: Lonely college freshman Alex has closed himself off from his peers, who all appear to have this whole "college thing" figured out. But everything changes one night when Alex takes a leap and attends a party at Shithouse - a legendary party fraternity

recommendations.title: Train
recommendations.overview: After a night of wild partying and missing their train, the group of students is invited to board another which happens to be heading their way. Once on board, members of the team begin to go missing, and their would-be saviors claim to have no idea

recommendations.title: Through My Window: Across the Sea
recommendations.overview: After a year of long-distance, Raquel and Ares reunite on a steamy beach trip. Faced with fresh flirtations and insecurities, will their love prevail?
